IRBF Team & Founder's Message

Led by veteran ex-bankers committed to grooming the next generation of retail banking professionals.

Home / Team

Founder's Message

At IRBF, our mission is simple: to transform fresh graduates into confident, job-ready retail bankers. Banking is not just a career, it is a discipline of trust, precision, and service. With decades of branch banking experience, our faculty mentors every student the way a senior banker grooms a promising recruit. We don't just teach concepts, we prepare you for the floor.

Founder & DirectorInstitute of Retail Banking & Finance

Leadership & Faculty

Senior ex-bankers from leading institutions guiding every batch.

Senior Faculty

Ex-SBI, Branch Manager

30+ years in retail banking operations and credit appraisal.

Lead Trainer

Ex-HDFC Bank

Specialist in sales, liabilities, and customer relationship management.

Placement Head

Ex-Axis Bank

Drives corporate alliances and 100% placement assistance.

Grooming university graduates into high-performing professional retail banking assets in Maharashtra.
